description: Call len() to get the length of sequences.
Call append() to add elements to the merged sequence.
Call extend() to add elements from sequences to the merged sequence.
Call pop() to remove the last element if a duplicate is found.
Add the left element to the merged sequence.

conditions: merged and left and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Remove the last element if it is a duplicate shared by both tails.

conditions: not merged or not left or (not right) or (not merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Do not remove any duplicate element.
Iterate over the sequences until one is fully merged.
